ns0:entry.ns0:title: InsForge/InsForge
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/InsForge/InsForge
Language: typescript
Give agents everything they need to ship fullstack apps. The backend built for agentic development.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: KeygraphHQ/shannon
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/KeygraphHQ/shannon
Language: typescript
Shannon Lite is an autonomous, white-box AI pentester for web applications and APIs. It analyzes your source code, identifies attack vectors, and executes real exploits to prove vulnerabilities before they reach production.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Stirling-Tools/Stirling-PDF
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Stirling-Tools/Stirling-PDF
Language: typescript
#1 PDF Application on GitHub that lets you edit PDFs on any device anywhere

ns0:entry.ns0:title: koala73/worldmonitor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/koala73/worldmonitor
Language: typescript
Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface

ns0:entry.ns0:title: langfuse/langfuse
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/langfuse/langfuse
Language: typescript
🪢 Open source LLM engineering platform: LLM Observability, metrics, evals, prompt management, playground, datasets. Integrates with OpenTelemetry, Langchain, OpenAI SDK, LiteLLM, and more. 🍊YC W23

ns0:entry.ns0:title: open-metadata/OpenMetadata
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/open-metadata/OpenMetadata
Language: typescript
OpenMetadata is a unified metadata platform for data discovery, data observability, and data governance powered by a central metadata repository, in-depth column level lineage, and seamless team collaboration.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: thunderbird/thunderbolt
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/thunderbird/thunderbolt
Language: typescript
AI You Control: Choose your models. Own your data. Eliminate vendor lock-in.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vercel-labs/skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vercel-labs/skills
Language: typescript
The open agent skills tool - npx skills

ns0:entry.ns0:title: xiangechen/chili3d
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/xiangechen/chili3d
Language: typescript
A browser-based 3D CAD application for online model design and editing

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zilliztech/claude-context
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zilliztech/claude-context
Language: typescript
Code search MCP for Claude Code. Make entire codebase the context for any coding agent.
